signals.headline: CPAC Straw Poll Confirms Vance as Top Choice for 2028 Republican Presidential Nominee with 53% Support** | YES | MED con
signals.raw:
CPAC Straw Poll Confirms Vance as Top Choice for 2028 Republican Presidential Nominee with 53% Support** | YES | MED confidence[1][2]

Vice President J.D. Vance topped a CPAC straw poll of about 1,600 participants as the preferred GOP nominee for the 2028 presidential election, securing 53% of votes—down slightly from last year but still a strong signal of conservative base support[1][2]. Secretar

signals.headline: **Solana Teases XRP Integration (April 15):** Solana's official X account posted a cryptic video tagged "XRP," sparking
signals.raw: **Solana Teases XRP Integration (April 15):** Solana's official X account posted a cryptic video tagged "XRP," sparking speculation of cross-chain collaboration, but no formal partnership confirmed; XRP rose 2.4% to $1.39.[1][7]

signals.headline: **Rakuten Wallet Lists XRP (April 15):** Enables 44 million Japanese users to buy/spend XRP, driving 4% gain to $1
signals.raw: **Rakuten Wallet Lists XRP (April 15):** Enables 44 million Japanese users to buy/spend XRP, driving 4% gain to $1.41, outperforming Ethereum/Solana; key breakout resistance at $1.45 unbreached.[3][6]

signals.raw: **SEC Roundtable Today (April 16):** Focused on options market structure, not CLARITY Act/crypto; no digital assets on agenda, limiting impact on XRP/Solana despite price holds (XRP ~$1.41, Solana ~$83).[2][6]

signals.raw: **No "Right Now" Breaking Confirmations:** All catalysts are yesterday's speculation or ongoing (e.g., SEC event not crypto-focused); Polymarket odds for CLARITY Act fell to 54%.[6]

signals.headline: South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months, missing market forecasts of 2.4% but exceeding the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid global energy volatility from the Iran conflict.[1]  
This data, released around early April 2026, aligns with the central bank'
